title: Dutch Stamppot with Cassaba
description: A traditional Dutch dish made with boiled potatoes, kale, and sausage. This recipe adds a sweet and tangy flavor with cooked cassaba.
instructions: Boil the potatoes and cassaba in water until tender.
Heat the margarine in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the chopped stamppot and cook until wilted.
Drain the potatoes and cassaba, then mash in a bowl with margarine and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Serve the mashed potatoes and cassaba with the sausage and stamppot mixture.
Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
